title: [podman-5.8] Add missing go.sum and bump image to v5.39.1
body:
Stupidity Alert!!!

In my last PR to for image, I neglected to run `go mod vendor` and due to that, go.sum was not generated or included.  This PR fixes that, and bumps image to v5.39.1

comments.body: Oh wait, we do not run the github action check who should have caught this on the branches. So not your fault but our miss configured testing.
